criteria.criterionText: Then it should inspect the generated Markdown report as a human-facing artifact
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The content of the 'report.md' file was not provided to the LLM for inspection, preventing verification of this criterion.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the actual content of the 'report.md' file for review.

criteria.criterionText: And it should inspect the HTML projection when HTML rendering is available
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Neither the HTML projection file nor a rendered view of it was provided to the LLM, preventing inspection.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the actual HTML projection or a rendered view for review.

criteria.llmObservationSummary: The content of the 'report.md' file was not provided to the LLM for inspection, preventing verification of this criterion.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the actual content of the 'report.md' file for review.

criteria.criterionText: And visual or readability blockers should be recorded in the QA bundle
criteria.llmObservationSummary: As the primary report surfaces were not provided, no visual or readability blockers could be identified or recorded by the LLM.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the report content to enable identification and recording of blockers.

criteria.criterionText: And a screenshot index should be written when visual surfaces are inspected.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: No visual surfaces (e.g., rendered HTML with screenshots) were provided for inspection, thus the presence or absence of a screenshot index could not be verified.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the visual surfaces and the QA bundle to verify the screenshot index.
